title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Great Learning Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at Great Learning Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? Great Learning Digital Technologies in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Great Learning Digital Technologies:
Great Learning Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Great Learning Digital Technologies!
